name: atlas-artifact-runtime
description: Focused artifact import/export and runtime corpus eval cases.

cases.query: Atlas MCP and Retrieval Evals quick start prefers repo-local .moxel/atlas/corpus.db artifact when present
cases.claim: Atlas retrieves artifact freshness, manifest, checksum, and runtime behavior evidence.
cases.whyItMatters: Users need confidence that generated/imported knowledge artifacts are fresh and trustworthy.
cases.expectedBehavior: Retrieve the expected source paths and terms while satisfying any negative, diagnostic, confidence, and hit-count expectations.
